input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.5.1
            TITLE: driver clearance

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.5.1: Driver Clearance
IN.5.1 Driver Clearance 
Each driver in the normal driving position is checked for the three: 
• Helmet clearance  F.5.6.3 
• Head Restraint positioning  T.2.8.5  
• Harness fit and adjustment  T.2.5, T.2.6, T.2.7

final_answer: rule IN.5.1: Driver Clearance IN.5.1 Driver Clearance Each driver in the normal driving position is checked for the three: • Helmet clearance F.5.6.3 • Head Restraint positioning T.2.8.5 • Harness fit and adjustment T.2.5, T.2.6, T.2.7
